text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Forgive me, Trainer. This injury is of<n>my own
wrongdoing...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Of course, this is but a trifle. It is<n>nowhere near
capable of halting my<n>advance.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However... I have let you become<n>enshrouded
with a gloom.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I, who have sworn to bring light to all,<n>have cast a
shadow on your<n>heart—you, the person closest to
me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to help you! My stride is still<n>strong, this
injury notwithstanding!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will bring peace to your troubled<n>heart—you have
my word!
choice_data_list: Sounds good. Let's take a break then.
Sounds good. Let's take a break then.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will bring peace to your troubled<n>heart—you have
my word!
choice_data_list: Sounds good. Let's take a break then.
Sounds good. Let's take a break then.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
H-have you not been listening?! In<n>order to put
you at ease, I...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Aha! I see what you're implying.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You wish to become my sanctuary. It<n>would bring
you the highest of joys...<n>Yes?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It vexes me to take a pause in our<n>onward march,
but this, too, is my<n>royal duty.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O seems to realize how<n>much is riding
on her shoulders and<n>takes a rest.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's right about me being worried. I<n>can only rest
assured if she's in<n>good condition!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! Now, let us venture<n>outdoors where
we—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: THE PAIN!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Hehehe... I-it seems the gods...<n>are more
jealous of you than... I had<n>imagined...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: This guilt... is too much... to bear!Collapse.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She must have committed another<n>wrongdoing
somehow. I rush over to<n>help her.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's right about me being worried. I<n>can only rest
assured if she's in<n>good condition!
Excellent! Now, let us venture<n>outdoors...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Well? What did you think of<n>my stride? Not
a notch shy of brilliant,<n>yes?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh, as I thought! Your feelings<n>come through
loud and clear.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
By the sight of my run, you have<n>been moved to
your core. Filled with<n>joy, you are at the brink of
tears!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There is no need for gratitude! As I<n>said, I already
know your feelings.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes! There, in your smile!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
There are a few things I could say to<n>her, perhaps
to curb her vanity. But I<n>suppose I can be content
that she's<n>healthy and in good spirits.
